CREATE TABLE test_lists (list1 ARRAY<FLOAT>, list2 ARRAY<FLOAT>);
SELECT list_cosine_similarity(list1, [0.2, 0.3, 0.5]) AS similarity FROM test_lists WHERE cardinality(list1) > 0;
SELECT list_cosine_similarity((SELECT list1 FROM test_lists WHERE list1 IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), list2) FROM test_lists WHERE list2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT list_cosine_similarity((SELECT list1 FROM test_lists WHERE list1[1] > 0), (SELECT list2 FROM test_lists WHERE list2[1] < 5));
CREATE TABLE another_list (val1 ARRAY<FLOAT), val2 ARRAY<FLOAT>);
SELECT list_cosine_similarity(test_lists.list1, another_list.val2) FROM test_lists JOIN another_list ON list_cosine_similarity(test_lists.list1, another_list.val1) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT list_cosine_similarity(list1, list2) FROM test_lists WHERE list2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY list1;
SELECT AVG(list_cosine_similarity(list1, list2)) AS avg_similarity FROM test_lists WHERE list1 IS NOT NULL AND list2 IS NOT NULL;
